project.title: Ocean Lighthouse
project.logline: On his last night, an old keeper tends the lamp one final time before automation takes over at dawn.
project.hook: A lone lighthouse beam sweeps across a black, storm-flecked sea.
project.payoff: At first light the old lamp goes dark for the last time; the keeper quietly closes the door.

shots.description: The lighthouse beam sweeps over a dark, choppy sea at night.

kling.content_prompt: A lighthouse beam sweeps across a black, storm-flecked sea at night, spray catching the light, the tower's lamp room glowing warm against cold blue darkness, lonely and cinematic.
kling.perspective: distant eye level from the water
kling.camera_move: slow push in toward the tower

shots.description: Inside the lamp room, the keeper polishes the great lens by hand.

kling.content_prompt: Inside the warm lamp room, the keeper polishes the huge brass-and-glass lens by hand, reflections drifting across the curved glass, dust in the lamplight, a quiet reverent mood.

shots.description: Dawn breaks; the lamp goes dark and the keeper closes the door.

kling.content_prompt: Pale dawn light fills the room as the great lamp dims and goes dark for the last time; the keeper steps out and quietly pulls the heavy door closed, the sea calm and silver behind.

lines.text: Forty years I kept this light.

checks.check: one clear idea, hook + payoff present
checks.evidence: beam hook -> lamp goes dark payoff

checks.check: all content_prompts describe scene/action only (no appearance words)
job K1 within caps (3 shots, 13s, 1 element)
